CVE-2024-37794.title: Improper input validation in CVC5 Solver v1.1.3 allows attackers  ...
CVE-2024-37794.description: Improper input validation in CVC5 Solver v1.1.3 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted SMT2 input file.

CVE-2024-37795.title: A segmentation fault in CVC5 Solver v1.1.3 allows attackers to ca ...
CVE-2024-37795.description: A segmentation fault in CVC5 Solver v1.1.3 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted SMT-LIB input file containing the `set-logic` command with specific formatting errors.
